STS2_WINEFOX-DIGGING.title: Digging
STS2_WINEFOX-DIGGING.description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain resources.
STS2_WINEFOX-WOOD.title: Plank
STS2_WINEFOX-WOOD.description: A basic material used for crafting.
STS2_WINEFOX-STONE.title: Cobblestone
STS2_WINEFOX-STONE.description: A basic material used for crafting.
STS2_WINEFOX-PLANT.title: Planting
STS2_WINEFOX-PLANT.description: At the start of next turn, gain 1 [gold]Plank[/gold].
STS2_WINEFOX-STEAM.title: Steam
STS2_WINEFOX-STEAM.description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINEFOX-STRESS.title: Stress
STS2_WINEFOX-STRESS.description: When you gain resources, consume 1 Stress to double that gain.
STS2_WINEFOX-IRON.title: Iron Ingot
STS2_WINEFOX-IRON.description: An advanced material used for crafting.
STS2_WINEFOX-STRENGTH.title: Strength
STS2_WINEFOX-STRENGTH.description: Strength increases the damage dealt by Attack cards.
STS2_WINEFOX-PLATING.title: Plating
STS2_WINEFOX-PLATING.description: Gain Block at the end of your turn. [gold]Plating[/gold] loses [blue]1[/blue] stack at the start of your turn.
STS2_WINEFOX-DIAMOND.title: Diamond
STS2_WINEFOX-DIAMOND.description: An advanced material used for crafting.
STS2_WINEFOX-MATERIAL.title: Material
STS2_WINEFOX-CRAFT.title: Craft
STS2_WINEFOX-CRAFT.description: Based on how many [gold]Materials[/gold] you have, show the available options, spend the matching [gold]Materials[/gold], and [gold]choose[/gold] a card.
